name: signoz
description: Official SigNoz plugin for MCP setup, docs, queries, dashboards, and alerts

SIGNOZ_REGION.title: SigNoz Cloud Region
SIGNOZ_REGION.description: Your SigNoz Cloud region code, shown under **Settings -> Ingestion** (see the [region reference](https://signoz.io/docs/ingestion/signoz-cloud/keys/)). The bundled MCP config fills this into `https://mcp.<region>.signoz.cloud/mcp`. Self-hosted SigNoz? Any region you pick here is ignored — run `/signoz-mcp-setup` with your own HTTP `/mcp` URL instead.

SIGNOZ_SELF_HOSTED.title: Self-hosted SigNoz? (yes / no)
SIGNOZ_SELF_HOSTED.description: Choose `yes` if you run your own SigNoz instead of SigNoz Cloud; choose `no` (or leave unset) for SigNoz Cloud. If `yes`, the region above is ignored: after install, run `/signoz-mcp-setup` in an agent chat with your self-hosted HTTP `/mcp` URL (for example `/signoz-mcp-setup http://localhost:8000/mcp`), then reload Cursor.
